leadText: Route 8 (Japanese: ８番道路 Route 8) is a route in northeast Galar that connects Route 7 and Circhester. The northern portion of the route is also known as Steamdrift Way (Japanese: 湯けむり小路 Steamy Path).

sections.title: Trivia
sections.text: Trivia [ edit | edit source ] The theme for this route, as well as Routes 6 , 7 , and 9 , is a shortened version of the theme used in the northern parts of the Wild Area .
